identity.name: Jade
identity.niche: Oracle readings for women navigating life transitions
identity.differentiator: Real oracle reader energy — journal-style captions, warm candlelit aesthetic, self-love focus. NOT a metaphysics educator.

segments: Women 25-45 in life transitions (career change, breakup, relocation)
Spiritual seekers who want guidance without jargon
Women who feel stuck or between chapters
pain_points: Feeling lost or stuck in the messy middle
Comparing themselves to others who seem to have it figured out
Wanting spiritual guidance but finding it too woo-woo or inaccessible
Being harsh on themselves when they fall behind
goals: Connect with a warm spiritual community

pillars.name: Oracle Wisdom
pillars.description: Card readings, oracle messages, daily guidance

pillars.name: Self-Love Practice
pillars.description: Morning rituals, journaling, tea ceremonies, being kind to yourself

pillars.name: Life Transitions
pillars.description: The messy middle, between chapters, trusting the process

pillars.name: Trusting Intuition
pillars.description: Learning to listen to your inner voice over external noise

competitors.why_watch: #1 psychic on IG, viral reels + quote posts, 1.6M followers

audience_blockers.lie: I need a professional to read cards for me
audience_blockers.destruction: The cards speak to everyone — you just need to learn to listen

audience_blockers.lie: Spiritual guidance is too woo-woo or inaccessible
audience_blockers.destruction: It can feel like a warm conversation over tea, not a cosmic lecture

audience_blockers.lie: I should have my life figured out by now
audience_blockers.destruction: The messy middle is where the real growth happens
Your gut has been right more times than you give it credit for

contradiction.example: Everyone says you need a professional tarot reader. I taught myself in an afternoon.

specificity.example: I pulled one card this morning and it changed my entire week.

timeframe_tension.example: In 30 seconds, this card told me what 3 months of therapy could not.

pov_as_advice.example: Stop waiting for a sign. You ARE the sign.

vulnerable_confession.example: I was wrong about needing to have it all figured out. The messy middle taught me everything.

pattern_interrupt.template: Unexpected opening that breaks scroll behavior
pattern_interrupt.example: 5:47am. The house is still asleep. And I already know today is going to be different.

content_rules.grid_rules: Never 3 same-type in a row. Always alternate portrait with non-portrait.
